title: ETF Evaluation Academy 2.0 resources
body: "Launched by the Evaluation Task Force (ETF), the Evaluation Academy is a cost-effective, relevant and high-quality training offer that can be owned and customised by your department.   The following departments have ETF-trained Academy staff delivering a customised version of the Academy in their departments:   Cabinet Office Department for Business and Trade Department for the Environment and Rural Affairs Department for Culture, Media and Sport NHS England Department for Health and Social Care Ministry of Housing and Local Government Office for National Statistics Health and Safety Executive Department for Education HM Treasury Ministry of Defence Ministry of Justice Foreign Commonwealth and Development Office Home Office Natural England College of Police HM Revenue and Customs Department for Work and Pensions Department for Science, Innovation and Technology UK Health Security Agency Intellectual Property Office UK Research & Innovation Welsh Government Scottish Government   If you don’t know who is leading this in your department, please feel free to contact etf@cabinetoffice.gov.uk for their contact details.  On this page, we’ve compiled the general slide decks that are used by the Cabinet Office, compiling a selection of case studies and examples across government. The slide decks include ten core modules which introduce all the technical and soft skills required to become an effective evaluator in Government.  If you have any questions or are interested in learning more about the Academy, please get in touch with the Evaluation Task Force at etf@cabinetoffice.gov.uk. "
